name: agent-compat
description: Compatibility layer that converts Copilot *.agent.md custom agents into Codex AGENTS.md and Claude custom-instructions.md overlays.

interface.shortDescription: Generate compact Codex and Claude routing stubs with per-agent references from Copilot *.agent.md custom agents.
interface.longDescription: Agent Compat scans standalone and plugin-owned Copilot custom agents, validates frontmatter and safety constraints, then generates compact managed Codex AGENTS.md and Claude custom-instructions.md routing sections plus host-specific reference files. Stubs route by explicit agent name or trigger description, while reference files preserve scope, tools, subagent references, handoffs, and body instructions without bloating default context.
defaultPrompt: Scan this repository for Copilot custom agents.
Validate agent compatibility for Codex and Claude.
Generate Codex and Claude instruction overlays.
Install managed agent compatibility sections into this repository.
